subject: Re:
body: I really like the  Wait until its too Late,     to be your critiqe of the communities foreign policy.    Years ago , things moved slowly,  stalin took weeks to defend.  months of prepartion.  strategies etc.   today these things force decision, for good and for bad   ..  The U. S  wait policy , the palestinain wait policy, iran wait policy,
